content: Why you gotta hate on my Nymph and Lily? <:RushiaSadCry:1306034963811926056>
Also, Casia lets you top up on gdoll buffs and debuffs in ultra space. I hate her shuffle so I just sell it in the shop for a free gold relic.
GDoll just does Nymph's job but better
Have you created character cards for your GPT? It will help keep the pronouns consistent.
If you send me the character profile for Jenkins and some lines in Chinese from chapter 2, I can provide a sample translation.

mb its better to have a dict with values as the keywords, like : dict =  {'aliemus_key': 'aliemus'} that will be translated only one time (or by hand) and than used as keys in cards, like: f"deals 107 damage. /n Name gains 8 {dict['aliemus_key']}". 
And this can be applied to other diff terms if needed. 
Ofc i dont know how the code works so i just suggest\ask why not

Dictionaries would work best for place names and background material.

Character profile cards would help make the dialogue more consistent. E.g. aegis would have a different way of speaking than 24, AI doesn't know that so you have to provide examples in the character card.

yep i agree, but they would also work the same for cards, arent they? cause we translate the keword only once with gpt in dict and than it can be used everywhere instead of typing terms and keywords, mb im mistaken
Note to self, check this place before doing DZone
